rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR MOOT BECAUSE MOTION UNDER ATTACK HAS BEEN WITHDRAWN. (CW)
CONTINUED TO 3/18/02 PER STIP OF PARTIES.

DEMURRERS PER CCP 430.10(A) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1,2,3,4,6, AND 9. SEE TULLY V. BAILEY, (1941) 46 CAL.APP.2D 195. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BASED ON NONJOINDER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AND PLAINTIFF TO NAME PANAMANIAN COUPLE. SEE CCP 389. DEMURRER PER CCP 430.10(G) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2,4,9, AND 12. DEMURRER PER CCP 430.10(F) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5,6, AND 12. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. OVERRULE REMAINING DEMURRERS. (PB)
